verified_fixed_causes: randomly initialized 24-layer SkeletonOPT used post-LN and barely learned
learned-query projection compressed 1024 ordered condition tokens to 257 anonymous slots and collapsed condition identity
long constant full-model 1e-4 learning rate collapsed direct-1024 conditioner separation
verified_open_facts: the four heldout52 results match path query frame selected frames query normalization and target joint count row by row
flat UniRig succeeds on 42 of 52 rows and hits max tokens without EOS on the other 10
flat UniRig common rows have mean J2J 0.006266 and mean topology F1 0.951028
Puppeteer sample80000 low-joint rows are syntactically valid but have mean joint-count errors of 54.25 on train-low and 65.25 on valid-low
Puppeteer sample80000 and final have identical generated token sequences on 50 of 52 rows, while best_val is not better
correct cross-asset condition improves low-joint coordinate likelihood for 16 of 16 samples
low-joint failure already exists under ground-truth prefix
same-asset wrong-pose conditions worsen coordinate NLL much more than changing the surface FPS seed, so the decoder uses the current pose and FPS randomness is not the primary failure
joint0 is not uniquely underfit under ground-truth prefix; later low-joint positions are usually equally or more inaccurate
the first free-generation mismatch on all heldout52 rows is joint0 coordinate because it is the first autoregressive decision
the dominant exact 52-joint parent topology occurs 4930 times in training, while low-joint rows contain 142 topologies among 396 rows
on valid-common60, topology training frequency remains strongly associated with coordinate NLL and topology F1 after controlling target joint count
Puppeteer generalizes the frequent 52-joint family to unseen valid assets but fails rare and unseen topology families
low-joint mapping is already underfit under ground-truth prefix, then continuation and self-prefix rollout amplify it into overlong high-frequency templates
heldout52 train-low and valid-low mean 4-10 joints, not low topology frequency; train-common is a random 22-92-joint training stratum
flat UniRig hitmax by exact target topology frequency is 0/12 for 100-plus, 2/20 for 10-99, 3/11 for 2-9, 3/3 for singleton, and 2/6 for unseen
the exact-topology alpha-0.75 sequence-mean 300-step probe slightly changed heldout52 F1 from 0.202308 to 0.208580 but degraded valid-common60 F1 from 0.475656 to 0.401310 and is rejected
baseline Puppeteer self-prefix rollout lowers coordinate accuracy from 0.5281 to 0.4075, parent accuracy from 0.9149 to 0.8149, and EOS accuracy from 0.4667 to 0.1556
sibling order currently contains a bone-name lexical tie-break defect, but unordered-tree auditing merges only 180 ordered singleton rows and does not explain the main long tail
unknowns: which topology and length decision representation can make parent and EOS depend directly on condition without destroying frequent-family geometry
whether a different explicit-tree decoder representation can preserve the flat UniRig prior while generalizing rare topology and predicting parent index explicitly
next_required_result: Define and audit a new topology/length decision representation or objective that makes parent and EOS depend directly on condition while preserving flat UniRig geometry; do not start another training run before code-level contract, gradient, GT-prefix, self-prefix, and matched-generation preflights are specified.

active_operation.name: flat_unirig_hgc2h100_matched80k_20260717_and_matched_heldout52
active_operation.reason: The Codex-managed SSH PTY was last polled at 18:30:24 JST, then left unsupervised until the next poll at 19:50:49 JST. SGE ended the interactive qlogin at 19:50:36 with SIGKILL. Trainer logs contain no exception, and qacct shows no user deletion or memory-limit failure. The evidence does not establish a fixed five-hour PTY limit; the verified operational failure was ending the monitoring turn and leaving the foreground SSH/qlogin session unmaintained for about 80 minutes. HGC tmux is not a supported persistence mechanism.

last_operation.name: puppeteer_topology_sampler_and_self_prefix_causal_diagnosis
last_operation.diagnosis: The model uses the correct mesh and current pose. Rare-family mapping is already weak under a ground-truth prefix and self-prefix rollout further degrades coordinates, parents, and EOS. Exact-topology resampling alone slightly changes heldout52 but materially degrades valid-common60, so frequency imbalance is real but not a sufficient standalone repair.
